vocab.meaning: lột tả được linh hồn/bản chất của
vocab.example: I love taking photos of old cathedrals because they really capture the essence of a city's historical journey.

vocab.meaning: một bữa tiệc mãn nhãn/thứ gì đó cực kỳ đẹp
vocab.example: The intricate carvings on that temple were a total feast for the eyes, so I just had to snap a few pictures.
I enjoy photographing ancient citadels that have stood the test of time, showing a stark contrast to modern skyscrapers.

vocab.meaning: vượt trội hơn hẳn/đẳng cấp hơn
vocab.example: The architecture in Paris is a cut above the rest, which makes every street corner a perfect photographic opportunity.

vocab.meaning: khiến ai đó phải dừng lại ngay lập tức (vì kinh ngạc)
vocab.example: Occasionally, a building's avant-garde design will stop me in my tracks and compel me to reach for my camera.

vocab.meaning: gợi lên sự đồng cảm/cảm xúc mãnh liệt
vocab.example: Symmetrical brutalist buildings really strike a chord with me, so they are the main subjects of my photography.
That the Opera House is a masterpiece is beyond all dispute, making it the most photographed building in my collection.

vocab.meaning: khiến ai đó vô cùng kinh ngạc
vocab.example: The sheer scale of those futuristic skyscrapers in Dubai absolutely blew my mind when I viewed them through my lens.

vocab.meaning: tốt hơn một chút/cao hơn một bậc
vocab.example: For me, the aesthetic appeal of a colonial building is a notch above a standard glass office block.

vocab.meaning: xác nhận/đảm bảo cho chất lượng hoặc vẻ đẹp
vocab.example: I can personally vouch for the photogenic nature of this district; every building here is a work of art.
